reviews.review_description: Ownership was handed off to a new person, so they reuploaded the game, this one ain’t getting updated, the other one is the official one
This game has so much to it it has working cosmetics currency and content creators and the game is really active

This game is so much fun. There’s horror, zero gravity, parkour, rocket PVP if I had to choose which one was better it would be rocket PVP which is the best over all in my opinion cause u get the option to use a rocket launcher or a rock to launch your enemy’s off the battlefield. For the YouTubers out there they’re is LIV in the game which help the people make awesome videos. Goob tag vr is the best game I ever played downloaded it now
